fans.fan1.use_adc_target.description: Use calibrated ADC feedback voltage to derive fan 1 target percent.

fans.fan1.pwm_inverted.description: Invert PWM output polarity for fan 1.

fans.fan1.pwm_min_percent.description: Minimum PWM duty cycle for fan 1.

fans.fan1.pwm_max_percent.description: Maximum PWM duty cycle for fan 1.

fans.fan2.use_adc_target.description: Use calibrated ADC feedback voltage to derive fan 2 target percent.

fans.fan2.pwm_inverted.description: Invert PWM output polarity for fan 2.

fans.fan2.pwm_min_percent.description: Minimum PWM duty cycle for fan 2.

fans.fan2.pwm_max_percent.description: Maximum PWM duty cycle for fan 2.

host.alive_check_enabled.description: When host-controlled mode is active, require periodic keepalive from the upper computer.

host.alive_timeout_ms.description: Upper computer keepalive timeout in milliseconds.
